lines.text: Where... am I? My head is spinning. I can see a village in the distance through the mist.
I need to find someone who can tell me what's going on. The Village Elder might know.
Ah, a stranger! You appeared in a flash of light, they say. You are a Riftwalker... I thought your kind was just a legend.
The land is dying, stranger. The Ashenfall — a rain of dark ash — began months ago. Corruption spreads from the east, twisting everything it touches.
But you... you seem unaffected. Perhaps you are the one the old prophecies spoke of.

responses.text: What can I do to help?

lines.text: For now, prove yourself. The meadow is plagued by creatures grown bold from the corruption. Show me you can fight, and I will tell you more.
The creatures nearby grow more aggressive each day — Meadow Slimes and Rabid Wolves plague our farmers.
Clear them out and prove you have the strength of a true Riftwalker.
You've done well, Riftwalker. The village is safer thanks to you.
Take this sword — it has served me well in my younger days. You'll need it for what comes next.
There's something darker stirring at the edge of the Cursed Forest to the east. I've heard reports of strange purple energy...
The reports are troubling. Dark energy seeps from the forest edge, corrupting everything it touches.
I need you to go there, collect samples, and deal with the corrupted beasts. Then seek out the Hermit Witch — she lives deep in the Cursed Forest and may know more.
So the village fool finally sent someone competent. Let me see those samples...
Just as I feared. This corruption comes from deep within the earth — from the Void Weaver's prison. The seals are breaking.
You must venture deeper. The source of this corruption must be found and destroyed. But that is a tale for another time...
If you truly wish to fight this corruption, you'll need my help. But first, I need Dark Roots to brew a protective ward.
The spiders have overrun the forest paths. Clear them and bring me the roots. Then we'll talk about what lies beneath.
Good, good. With these roots, I can brew a ward that will protect you from the worst of the corruption's influence.
Listen well, Riftwalker. There is an ancient temple in the Dark Swamp — the Drowned Temple. I believe the first source of corruption lies there.
